hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */vendor/nanobot/*|*/mc/skills/*|*/convex/_generated/*|*node_modules*) exit 0;; */mc/*.py|*/tests/mc/*.py|*/tests/cc/*.py|*/boot/*.py) uv run ruff format "$f" && uv run ruff check --fix "$f";; */dashboard/*.ts|*/dashboard/*.tsx|*/dashboard/*.js|*/dashboard/*.mjs) cd "$(echo "$f" | sed 's|/dashboard/.*|/dashboard|')" && npx prettier --write "$f";; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
